title: Strata scenario frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block in a browser scenario file.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must match the filename (without .md).

surfaces.description: Which observation surfaces this scenario uses.

fixtures.description: Named fixtures required before the scenario runs.

actions.description: High-level user actions performed in this scenario.

waits.description: Named async convergence points (page loads, API responses, etc.).
